creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Olaf,

what I meant to say in my last followup to ports/128603 [1] was that - if
you want to provide a patch for the textproc/flex port that changes the
limit to 99999 optionally, I would commit it.

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128603
